import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_type_coercion_price_handles_string_prices():
    # Items list includes a price as a string.
    items = [
        {"name": "ItemA", "price": 100},
        {"name": "ItemB", "price": "200"},
        {"name": "ItemC", "price": "50"},
    ]
    threshold = 150
    # The function should coerce string prices to integers and filter correctly.
    result = source.filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    # Expected only the item with price 200 (as integer) to be returned.
    expected = [{"name": "ItemB", "price": "200"}]
    assert result == expected
